Driving in heavy traffic, on dirt roads or in urban or dusty conditions may shorten the life of the cabin air filter. Replacement may be required if reduced air flow is noted.

Do not rotate staggered tires from front to back. If tires are asymmetric(directional), do not rotate side to side. Follow all OEM tire rotation recommendations and pattern.

Driving on dirt roads or dusty roads, driving while towing, using  car-top carrier, or heavy vehicle loading, repeated trips of less than five miles in temperatures below 32 F, and/or extensive idling and/or low speed during for a long distance such as police, taxi or door-to-door delivery use.
Reset the oil replacement reminder light ("MAINT REQD") or the message "OIL MAINTENANCE REQUIRED" on the multi-information display after maintenance.
